surface.name: Embed video chat quickly with Daily Prebuilt
surface.selection_basis: The current Daily docs home places Daily Prebuilt first under Start here and describes it as a complete call UI with a single line of code. Its linked guide says Prebuilt is the best choice when speed is the top priority and provides a complete room-URL plus iframe path.

alternatives_considered.name: Build a custom UI with daily-js
alternatives_considered.reason_not_primary: The docs home lists this after Prebuilt, and the Prebuilt guide reserves the custom call object for UI customization needs.

alternatives_considered.name: Daily React quickstart
alternatives_considered.reason_not_primary: This is a framework-specific custom-UI route rather than the first Start here option.

alternatives_considered.name: REST API room creation
alternatives_considered.reason_not_primary: The API creates rooms and tokens but does not by itself render or join the first call UI; it is an input branch to Prebuilt.

alternatives_considered.name: Mobile SDK quickstarts
alternatives_considered.reason_not_primary: These are platform-specific routes listed in SDK Guides after the general Start here options.

entry_point.developer_intent: Create a Daily room URL and embed Daily Prebuilt in a minimal web page until the page joins the room and displays the working call UI.
assumed_prior_state: The developer does not yet have a Daily room URL.
The developer has a minimal website or can create and open an HTML page.

documented_first_success.official_milestone: Embed a fully functioning video chat widget into a website or app.
documented_first_success.normalized_outcome: A minimal HTML page imports daily-js, creates the Daily Prebuilt frame, joins the developer's Daily room URL, and displays the functioning video-call interface.
documented_first_success.observable_completion_signal: Opening the page renders the Daily Prebuilt iframe and the call joins the specified room, exposing the ready-to-use call UI.

boundary_evidence.official_label_or_terminal_state: The guide is titled Embed video chat quickly with Daily Prebuilt and says its step-by-step code embeds a fully functioning video chat widget after a Daily room URL is supplied.

documented_first_success.why_this_is_the_boundary: The rendered, joined widget is the complete result of the guide's Step-by-step guide. NPM import, fullscreen styling, avatars, theme, recording, and custom UI are presented as alternatives or later customization.

prerequisites.requirement: A Daily account with dashboard access or an API token capable of creating a room.
A website or minimal HTML page that can load JavaScript and be opened in a supported browser.
A Daily room URL created in the dashboard or through POST /rooms.

primary_path.action: Open Daily Docs and select Daily Prebuilt under Start here.
details: The home page places Prebuilt before custom UI and REST API.
primary_path.input: Intent to add a first video call quickly.

primary_path.action: Create or sign in to a Daily account.
primary_path.failure_or_wait: The inspected guide links to account/dashboard surfaces but does not enumerate registration or verification screens.

primary_path.action: Create a Daily room in the dashboard.
details: The guide accepts either Dashboard or REST API room creation.
primary_path.success_signal: The room appears and has a URL under the account's Daily domain.
primary_path.failure_or_wait: Current dashboard room fields and defaults are not enumerated in the guide.

details: The guide's example shape is https://your-team.daily.co/hello.
primary_path.success_signal: A complete HTTPS room URL is available.
primary_path.failure_or_wait: Using the wrong room or domain leads the embed to the wrong call.

primary_path.action: Create or open a minimal HTML page.
primary_path.success_signal: The page contains html and body structure.

primary_path.action: Add the cross-origin script import for @daily-co/daily-js from unpkg.
primary_path.input: HTML page and network access to the CDN.
primary_path.output: Daily JavaScript library loaded by the page.
primary_path.failure_or_wait: CSP, network, or CDN failures can block the library.

primary_path.success_signal: The call variable references a created frame.
primary_path.failure_or_wait: JavaScript errors or a missing library prevent frame creation.

primary_path.action: Replace DAILY_ROOM_URL in call.join with the copied room URL.
primary_path.output: Join invocation targeting the created room.
primary_path.success_signal: The source contains the correct URL.
primary_path.failure_or_wait: A placeholder or malformed URL prevents the intended join.

primary_path.action: Open or run the page in the browser.
primary_path.input: Completed HTML and browser network access.
primary_path.output: Loaded web page executing the Daily code.
primary_path.failure_or_wait: The guide does not prescribe a web server or local-open command.

primary_path.action: Join the specified Daily room and initialize the Prebuilt call interface.
primary_path.input: Rendered call frame and valid room.
primary_path.success_signal: The iframe displays the ready-to-use video call UI.
primary_path.failure_or_wait: Room access policy, browser media permissions, network conditions, or an invalid/expired room can block joining.

primary_path.action: Verify the embedded call UI is functioning.
details: The guide describes built-in bandwidth management, cross-browser UI, screen sharing, layouts, chat, reactions, and participant controls as available features.
primary_path.success_signal: The participant is in the specified room and can see the Daily Prebuilt call surface.
primary_path.failure_or_wait: Failure to join or render means the first success is incomplete.

branches.condition: The developer creates the room programmatically.
branches.path: Set a Daily API token, POST /rooms with optional name/privacy/properties, require a successful room object, and extract its url; use HTTP error response details if creation fails.
branches.effect_on_first_success: Replaces dashboard room creation with an authenticated API call.

branches.condition: The developer prefers package management over a CDN script.
branches.path: Install @daily-co/daily-js with npm or yarn and import it into the application bundle.
branches.effect_on_first_success: Adds package installation and bundler configuration.

branches.condition: The developer needs fullscreen styling or a leave button.
branches.path: Pass showLeaveButton and iframeStyle properties to createFrame.
branches.effect_on_first_success: Changes presentation but does not change the joined-call boundary.

branches.condition: The developer needs a custom UI rather than the ready-made widget.
branches.path: Switch to the Daily call object or Daily React quickstart.
branches.effect_on_first_success: Produces a longer, materially different UI implementation path.

friction_gates.description: Dashboard room creation requires a Daily account.
A room must exist and expose a room URL before Prebuilt can join.
The page must be allowed to load daily-js from the chosen CDN or package bundle.
Joining a functioning video call can require browser camera and microphone permission and room access under its current configuration.
The browser waits for room connection and media initialization; no specific duration is stated.

sources.title: Welcome to Daily Docs
evidence_supported: Prebuilt as first Start here route

sources.title: Embed video chat quickly with Daily Prebuilt

uncertainties.question: What exact current registration and dashboard room-creation fields does a brand-new Daily account see?
uncertainties.impact: The account and room gates cannot be decomposed screen by screen.
uncertainties.reason_unresolved: The selected guide links directly to the dashboard but does not document signup or dashboard form actions.

uncertainties.question: Does the minimal HTML need to be served over a particular origin for all target browser media policies?
uncertainties.impact: Opening the file directly may behave differently from serving it in a web app.
uncertainties.reason_unresolved: The guide supplies HTML but does not prescribe a local server or hosting method.

excluded_after_success: Custom UI with the call object or Daily React
Production hosting, observability, security, and scaling
